catalog_content:
Item Name: HomeBrewStuff 1 Gallon Table Top Nano-Brew Greenbelt Pale Ale (Partial Mash) Recipe Kit (Without HBS Booster) Bullet Point 1: Complete 1 gallon beer making ingredient recipe kit (9-10 12-ounce bottles) Bullet Point 2: Includes: liquid malt, grains, hops, ale yeast, straining bag Bullet Point 3: Bonus Includes: no-rinse sanitizer, priming sugar, and bottle caps Bullet Point 4: Takes 3 to 4 weeks start to finish Bullet Point 5: Perfect size for our HomeBrewStuff Table Top Nano-Brewery Product Description: The HomeBrewStuff Nano-Brewery 1 Gallon Beer Ingredient Kit
From our signature Nano-Brewery collection comes our Greenbelt Pale Ale recipe kit.
Our version of the perfect pale ale is named after the beautiful and scenic Boise Greenbelt along the Boise River. Similar to the Boise River, this ale is crisp, clean, and refreshing on a summer day. Has a balance of maltiness and bitterness. A simple malt base with caramel, toasty flavors being contributed simply from by 60L Crystal malt. Balancing this nicely is the citrus-like bitterness from cascade hops. In addition to the cascade hops, perle hops are added to tame the citrus and add a subtle earthy/pine characteristic. Finishes and ready to drink in 3 to 4 weeks.
Designed to pair perfectly with any of our 1 gallon Nano-Brewery Kits.
Og: 1.055
Fg: 1.011
Abv: 5.8%
Ibu: 10
If you choose the option for The HBS Nano-Brewery Booster:
You will receive one 6 oz package of HBS Nano-Brew Booster
Made from high quality Corn Solids, dry malt extract, and a special blend of yeast nutrient and energizer
These are specially tailored to compliment the recipe you ordered
Adds alcohol and body to any beer recipe without the dry, cidery taste
Each pouch of booster adds about 1.3% ABV per gallon batch.
Pictures are a representation of what comes in our kits. Your ingredients may differ slightly from the picture. Value: 128.0 Unit: Ounce
product_name: 1 Gallon Table Top Nano-Brew Greenbelt Pale Ale (Partial Mash) Recipe Kit (Without HBS Booster)
